FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASlROLOGY 19
Sun (father) and Government
Jupiter (Native's life)
Dragon Tail (Planet of liberation)
SUN+JUPITER+DRAGON TAIL.
The above chart indicates that the native's father will have
transcendental knowledge and
SUN + JUPITER
father was a respectable person
First, we are taking Sun for father. For Sun there is
conjunction of Jupiter+ Dragon Tail.
Sun meets Jupiter and Dragon Tail in successive east
Directions. That explains the spiritual nature of the native's father.
Now, let us take Jupiter, because he is the life of the native.
First, Jupiter meets Dragon Tail. Next he meets Sun. That is
Dragon Tail is 5th from Jupiter. Sun is in 9th to Jupiter.
